name: WE ARE VERIFIED 🌴
description:
“I’m still on a break from sparkling but I’m finally verified So I will write this in METAL GEAR SOLID TERMS”

“Mission status: Verified.

All channels secure. Intel confirms: objectives in sight, and team is green-lit. System diagnostics show zero anomalies—combat readiness at 100%. Surveillance drones report no hostiles in proximity. Communications link is stable, with encrypted protocols holding strong. Cipher activity is minimal; no interference detected. You’re operating in the shadows now, completely off the grid.

This is your moment. The mission parameters are clear. Proceed with stealth or strike hard—the choice is yours. Remember: you’re not just a soldier. You’re the one they call when others fall short. The battlefield is yours—you’re clear to engage.”

thank you everyone
creator: VENOM SEPTIC87
